responses: Hello! How can I help you with Green IT today?
Hi there! Ask me anything about sustainable coding.
Welcome! What would you like to know about Green IT?
Green IT encompasses the study and practice of environmentally sustainable computing or IT. It involves reducing the carbon footprint and energy consumption of IT systems.
Green IT is the practice of environmentally sustainable computing. It aims to minimize the negative impact of IT operations on the environment.
Some good practices include: optimizing algorithms, minimizing CPU operations, memory optimization, exploiting caching, and reducing network requests.
You can reduce energy by compressing images, cleaning up unused code/plugins, and optimizing your server.
